hooks.hook: POV: You're a ___ who wants to ___ without ___ and you find my page
hooks.why_it_works: Speaks directly to a specific person's desire and pain point
hooks.example: POV: You're a busy mom who wants to grow on Instagram without spending hours creating content

hooks.hook: The biggest lesson I learnt about ___ and it is NOT ___
hooks.why_it_works: Creates curiosity by contradicting common beliefs
hooks.example: The biggest lesson I learnt about going viral and it is NOT posting every day

hooks.hook: My ___ told me about the '___ theory' and it completely changed the way I ___
hooks.why_it_works: Borrows credibility and creates curiosity through labelling
hooks.example: My therapist told me about the 'Visibility Tax' and it completely changed how I show up online

hooks.hook: Nobody talks about ___ but it's the reason you're not getting ___
hooks.why_it_works: Creates urgency and positions you as someone with insider knowledge
hooks.example: Nobody talks about watch time but it's the reason you're not getting views

hooks.hook: Stop ___ and start ___ if you want ___
hooks.why_it_works: Direct, actionable, creates immediate desire to keep watching
hooks.example: Stop posting carousels and start making reels if you want 10x more reach

hooks.hook: How I went from ___ to ___ in ___ days (without ___)
hooks.why_it_works: Shows a concrete result with a timeframe — highly credible
hooks.example: How I went from 200 to 57K followers in 115 days without paid ads

hooks.hook: ___ mistakes that are killing your ___ (and how to fix them)
hooks.why_it_works: Numbers create specificity and promise actionable value
hooks.example: 3 mistakes that are killing your Instagram reach (and how to fix them)

hooks.hook: Things I wish I knew about ___ before I ___
hooks.why_it_works: Creates relatability and positions content as hard-won wisdom
hooks.example: Things I wish I knew about content creation before I wasted 2 years

hooks.hook: We're this close to ___ (tiny text: being your favorite ___)
hooks.why_it_works: Visual curiosity — makes viewers lean in to read the small text
hooks.example: We're this close to launching something that will change your content game

hooks.hook: It took me ___ years to learn this ___ trick — here it is in 60 seconds
hooks.why_it_works: Promises compressed value — years of knowledge in seconds
hooks.example: It took me 3 years to learn this editing trick — here it is in 60 seconds

hooks.hook: The ___ rule that top ___ creators use but never talk about
hooks.why_it_works: Implies exclusive knowledge that most people don't have access to
hooks.example: The 1% rule that top fitness creators use but never talk about

hooks.hook: I gained ___ followers by doing the opposite of what everyone says
hooks.why_it_works: Specific number + contrarian approach = irresistible curiosity
hooks.example: I gained 40K followers by posting LESS content than everyone else

hooks.hook: I tried ___ and here's what happened
hooks.why_it_works: It works because people are curious about personal experiences and outcomes
hooks.example: I tried using TikTok songs in my Instagram Reels and here's what happened

hooks.hook: Want to know the secret to ___?
hooks.why_it_works: It works because people are naturally curious and want to learn secrets and tips
hooks.example: Want to know the secret to getting more followers on Facebook for free?

hooks.hook: ___ that will change your ___ strategy forever
hooks.why_it_works: It works because people want to learn about new tools and strategies that can improve their results
hooks.example: 9 tools that will change your social media automation strategy forever

hooks.hook: The #1 thing you're doing wrong with ___
hooks.why_it_works: It works because people want to learn from their mistakes and improve their approach
hooks.example: The #1 thing you're doing wrong with measuring social media value

hooks.why_it_works: It works because people are looking for resources and tools to help them achieve their goals
hooks.example: Boost your content marketing with these 24 optimization tools

formats.description: 3 horizontal videos showcasing your product/service sliding onto a surface
formats.film: 3 horizontal clips — first two sliding onto a table, third showing the product
formats.text: Summer as a ___ or Summer at ___

formats.description: Film several angles layering clothing with a smooth transition
formats.film: Multiple angles layering clothing — use transition at the cut point
formats.text: None or a relatable caption about your outfit struggle
formats.sound: Trending audio with a beat drop

formats.description: First clip empty table, wipe lens, second clip reveals product
formats.film: Clip 1: empty surface, hand wipes lens. Clip 2: hand wipes then reveals product
formats.text: wait... let me wipe the camera lens / that's better

formats.description: Pretend to grab product coming down like a claw machine
formats.film: Reach up to grab product, split clip at grab point, add claw overlay in CapCut
formats.text: Your product name or a fun caption

formats.description: Photo of fingers pinching close together with tiny text between them
formats.film: Fingers pinching on aesthetic background, each slide zooms closer to tiny text
formats.text: We're this close to... (tiny text: being your favorite ___)

formats.description: Bold text first slide, value-packed slides, CTA on last slide
formats.film: Slide 1: Bold hook statement. Slides 2-6: one insight per slide. Last: CTA
formats.text: Hook on slide 1 must stop the scroll
